SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-04-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.
